criteria.name: AI Feature Set
criteria.description: Breadth and depth of AI-powered features for photo and video editing (e.g., object removal, style transfer, super-resolution, generative AI, etc.).

criteria.name: User Ratings and Reviews
criteria.description: User perception of the app's AI features and overall performance, ease of use, and output quality.

criteria.name: Number of Downloads/Installs
criteria.description: Indicates the app's popularity and reach.

criteria.name: Ease of Use
criteria.description: How easy it is for users to understand and use the AI features.

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app on multiple platforms (iOS, Android, Web).

criteria.name: Cost
criteria.description: Pricing model of the app (free, subscription-based, or one-time purchase).

criteria.name: Output Quality
criteria.description: Quality of the results of the AI processing in terms of resolution, clarity, and realism.
